label: Mono
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) annotated 14 states of mononuclear phagocytes (MPs) in human skin. The UMAP figure legend lists 'Inf. = inflammatory, Mono mac = monocyte derived macrophage'. Monocytes appear as a distinct population in the healthy adult skin dataset and were annotated using TransferAnchors alignment to blood MPs. In the figure abbreviations: 'Mono mac = monocyte derived macrophage'. The 'Mono' label refers to classical skin monocytes distinguished from monocyte-derived macrophages.
